_header._purpose: JSON Schema for the supervisor router's structured output

target_agent.description: Role name of the next worker. MUST be one of the registered roles; supervisor is responsible for picking a valid name.

reason.description: One-line rationale for the routing decision. Audited, not consumed by the worker.

decision_metadata.description: The same shape as AgentHandoff.decision_metadata; passed directly into the handoff payload.

fallback_agent.description: Optional. Agent to retry with if target_agent fails or rejects.
